title: Scan Pairing QR Code
instruction: Place the QR code in the frame to connect automatically.

guide.title: How do I get the QR code?
guide.body: Open Lynavo Drive on your computer, find the pairing code in Global Settings, then aim the camera at the QR code to connect automatically.

trouble.title: Having trouble scanning?
trouble.body: Return to the device list, choose the device manually, then enter the pairing code.

permissionDenied.text: Camera access is required to scan the QR code.
